descriptions: The two gangs were in a violent conflict over control of labor slugging.
edges.evidence_quote: Rosenzweig's dominance was challenged in 1913, when Philip "Pinchey" Paul began a war with Rosenzweig, lasting over several months.

descriptions: Coffin Cheaters absorbed Wizard MC through patching over in 2005.
edges.evidence_quote: later 'patched over' two Norwegian gangs, Forbidden Few MC and Wizard MC, in 2004 and 2005 respectively.

descriptions: Harvard Park Brims are listed as allies of Florencia 13 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia , Sureños , Pueblo Bishop Bloods , Mad Swan Bloods , Harvard Park Brims , East Coast Crips (Former rivals)

descriptions: The Papalia (as Barbaro-Papalia) were involved in criminal activities alongside the Italiano-Papalia.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Freeland" che porta all'arresto di 20 persone affiliate o facenti riferimento alle 'ndrine degli Italiano-Papalia, Barbaro -Papalia e Alvaro-Macrì - Violi

descriptions: Grim Reapers patched over to become Hells Angels chapters.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1997 the Grim Reapers club of Calgary, Alberta were patched over

descriptions: Abu Amara Brigades joined Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: In October 2015, Abu Amara Brigades left the Levant Front, which they had joined in February 2015, and joined Ahrar al-Sham.

descriptions: Abu Amara Brigades is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: the Israeli Mossad assassinated the Syrian scientist, Aziz Azbar, with the assistance of Abu Amara Brigades, which is a faction within Hay'at Tahrir Al-Sham.

descriptions: Bacchus has close relationships with Vagabonds MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club manages close relationships with other well-established Canadian motorcycle clubs like Para-dice Riders MC, Vagabonds MC, Highlanders MC, and the Charlottetown Harley Club.

descriptions: Satan's Choice Toronto chapter sparked a gang war with Vagabonds MC.
edges.evidence_quote: This success emboldened elements of Satan's Choice, in particular their Toronto chapter, into sparking a gang war with two rival biker gangs in the city, the Black Diamond Riders MC and the Vagabonds MC.

descriptions: FMV is listed as a rival of Bala na Cara in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivais: Primeiro Comando da Capital , Os Manos , V7 , FMV

descriptions: Listed as rivals in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Columbia Point Dawgs (long-standing), Vamp Hill Boys, H Block, X-men, Franklin Hill Giants, Greenwood Street Posse, Ruggles St , 1850 Washington St, Castle Square Cubs

descriptions: Sarcone is connected to Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Perseverance" contro i Sarcone e i Muto, collegati con i Grande Aracri

descriptions: ISIS–K formed an alliance with IMT.
edges.evidence_quote: the newly ordained ISIS–K forged significant alliances with other Sunni jihadist movements in the region to include the Islamic Movement of Uzbekistan (IMU), Islamic Movement of Turkmenistan (IMT), Uyghur East Turkestan Islamic Party (ETIP), Jamaat Ansarullah, Harakat Islami Tajikistan, and the Islamic Jihad Renaissance Party of Tajikistan (IJRPT), Hezb-e Islami Gulbuddin, and Balochi militant groups including the Pakistani Jundullah movement and Iranian Jundullah movement

descriptions: Direct Action Against Drugs was a cover name used by the IRA for killings.
edges.evidence_quote: The IRA targeted drug dealers with punishment shootings and ordered them to leave Ireland, and some were killed using the covername Direct Action Against Drugs.

Black Mafia Family.description: The Black Mafia Family (BMF) is a drug trafficking and money laundering organization founded in 1985 in Detroit, Michigan by brothers Demetrius and Terry Flenory. It distributed cocaine across the United States with ties to Mexican cartels and used a hip-hop record label as a front. The organization was dismantled by federal indictments in 2005, with the Flenory brothers sentenced to 30 years in prison.

descriptions: Black Mafia Family is allied with Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation ( Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals , etc), Crips , Zoe Pound , etc.

descriptions: Sin City Mafia is described as BMF's sister organization, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: They traced the last number called in Gatling's phone to Jerry Davis, leader of BMF's supposed sister organization , the Sin City Mafia.

descriptions: Black Mafia Family is allied with Zoe Pound.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation ( Gangster Disciples , Black Disciples , Black Gangsters, Insane Spanish Cobras , Maniac Latin Disciples , Imperial Gangsters , Gangster Sin City Boys, Simon City Royals , etc), Crips , Zoe Pound , etc.

descriptions: OutLaw Gangster Disciples is allied with Black Mafia Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Folk Nation , Crips , Zoe Pound Gang , Black Guerilla Family , and Black Mafia Family

descriptions: Zoe Pound is allied with Black Mafia Family.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Black Mafia Family , Bloods , and Crips

National Liberation Army (Colombia).description: Colombian far-left guerrilla organization founded in 1964 by Fabio Vásquez Castaño and other rebels trained in Cuba. It advocates a composite ideology of Marxism–Leninism, Camilism, and liberation theology. The ELN has been involved in the Colombian conflict and is designated as a terrorist group by several countries. As of 2026, it has approximately 5,000 fighters.

descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of ACC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP, ELN , Bloque Centauros de las AUC

descriptions: AUC was formed to combat ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Se consolidó como agrupación de varios grupos paramilitares el 18 de abril de 1997 para combatir a las guerrillas como: FARC-EP , ELN y disidencias del EPL .

descriptions: The AUC was formed to combat the ELN guerrilla group.
edges.evidence_quote: Se consolidó como agrupación de varios grupos paramilitares el 18 de abril de 1997 para combatir a las guerrillas como: FARC-EP , ELN y disidencias del EPL .

descriptions: AUC considered ELN as main enemy and engaged in conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC's main enemies were the leftist insurgency groups Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (FARC) and the National Liberation Army (ELN).

descriptions: The AUC conducted retaliations and attacks against the ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The AUC was responsible for retaliations against the FARC and ELN communist organization as well as numerous attacks against civilians beginning in 1997 with the Mapiripán massacre.

descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of Bloque Metro in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Ejército de Liberación Nacional

descriptions: Escobar hired the ELN to carry out bombings and assassinations.
edges.evidence_quote: Escobar also maintained relations with the Sandinista government in Nicaragua and hired the National Liberation Army (ELN) to carry out bombings and assassinations against government targets.

descriptions: ELN is a rival of AGC.
edges.evidence_quote: Its rivals include the National Liberation Army (ELN).

descriptions: Clan del Golfo had a territorial dispute with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Venía sosteniendo una disputa territorial con otras organizaciones armadas como la guerrilla del ELN

descriptions: Bloque Héroes de Castaño (part of Clan del Golfo) is at war with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Se presume que serían ellos quienes están en guerra contra ... el ELN

descriptions: Clan del Golfo shares the drug trafficking scene with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Comparte el escenario del narcotráfico con otras organizaciones narcoterroristas , como ... el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN)

descriptions: Clan del Golfo formed a strategic alliance with ELN and FARC-EP.
edges.evidence_quote: Este clan trazó una alianza estratégica con las FARC-EP (desmovilizadas en 2017) y el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN)

descriptions: Both operate in the same drug trafficking arena.
edges.evidence_quote: Comparte el escenario del narcotráfico con otras organizaciones narcoterroristas , como ... el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN)

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of ERPAC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... ELN

descriptions: Los Caparrapos are possibly allied with ELN against Clan del Golfo.
edges.evidence_quote: Están posiblemente aliados con el ELN y las disidencias de las FARC-EP en su guerra contra el Clan del Golfo

descriptions: Los Rastrojos entered into armed conflict with the ELN after the alliance ended.
edges.evidence_quote: By March 2020, Los Rastrojos no longer had an alliance with the Colombian left-wing militant group National Liberation Army (ELN) and was now involved in a direct armed conflict with the group as well.

descriptions: By March 2020, Los Rastrojos were in conflict with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: el grupo ahora estaba en conflicto con el ELN luego de que los cuerpos de ocho miembros de Los Rastrojos fueran encontrados muertos

descriptions: Los Rastrojos had a cooperative agreement with the ELN for several years.
edges.evidence_quote: Currently, the Rastrojos have an agreement with the National Liberation Army (Ejército de Liberación Nacional – ELN) for several years in the departments of Cauca and Nariño.

descriptions: Los Rastrojos had an agreement with ELN for several years.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Rastrojos tienen un convenio con el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) por varios años

descriptions: AUC paramilitaries conducted anti-guerrilla operations against ELN, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: A Colombian government initiative towards granting the ELN a demilitarized zone in the southern region of the Bolívar Department was thwarted by right-wing political pressure from the United Self-Defense Forces of Colombia (AUC) whose paramilitary mercenaries conduct anti-guerrilla operations in that part of the department.

descriptions: Pablo Escobar hired ELN for bombings and assassinations.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN had relations with Pablo Escobar, with Escobar often hiring the ELN to carry out bombings and assassinations against government targets.

descriptions: FARC and ELN fought each other in Arauca in 2006.
edges.evidence_quote: In mid-2006, mutual rivalries between local FARC and ELN forces escalated into hostilities in Arauca, along the border with Venezuela. According to the BBC, 'the FARC have for some years moved to take over ELN territory near the Venezuelan border, and the smaller rebel army reacted by killing several FARC militants'. A statement posted on FARC's homepage accused the ELN of 'attacks that we only expected from the enemy'.

descriptions: ELN and FARC-EP occasionally conducted joint attacks against civilians.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN also occasionally operated with the FARC-EP, and like FARC, it has targeted civilians, according to a February 2005 report by the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights: 'During 2004, the FARC-EP and the ELN carried out a series of attacks against the civilian population, including several massacres of civilians and kidnappings by the FARC-EP. There were occasional joint actions by the FARC-EP and the ELN.'

descriptions: Infobox lists Tupamaro as an ally of ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Venezuela (2014–2026) Tupamaro , FARC-EP

descriptions: Tupamaro movement supports and expresses solidarity with ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: The ELN has received support from the Tupamaro movement in Venezuela, a Venezuelan colectivo and political party. The Tupamaro movement supported the ELN's dialogue with the Colombian government, stating, 'The Tupamaro Revolutionary Movement, now more than ever, stands in solidarity with this sister organization in the historic struggle against the neo-Granadian oligarchy and Yankee imperialism. We strongly ratify all of our support for the guerrillas and the ELN High Command, in the process that is developed with the participation of the Colombian people in the resolution of the armed conflict and the construction of peace with social justice'.

descriptions: EPL is in confrontation with ELN over territorial control and declared war on ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: En esta zona, mantiene una confrontación con el Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) por el control territorial; en su momento, la guerrilla le declaró oficialmente la guerra al ELN «hasta recuperar lo que ellos consideran su territorio y su gente».

descriptions: EPL considered ELN as enemies until 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ELN ( hasta 2021 )

descriptions: EPL declared war on ELN in 2018, ending a tacit alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: el EPL le declara la guerra al Frente de Guerra Nororiental del Ejército de Liberación Nacional (ELN) desde el 20 de marzo de 2018, terminando de esta manera la alianza tácita que tenían estos dos grupos

descriptions: Los Pelusos are at war with the ELN in the Catatumbo region.
edges.evidence_quote: afectados por la guerra que sostienen con el ELN en la región

descriptions: FARC is allied with the ELN.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armed groups ELN

descriptions: FARC and ELN announced cooperation to seek a political solution to the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On 1 July 2013, FARC and the second-largest guerrilla group in Colombia, ELN, announced that they would be working together to find a 'political solution to the social and armed conflict.'

descriptions: National Liberation Army is an ally of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: international alliances are thought to include ... National Liberation Army

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel finances and supports the National Liberation Army.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa Cartel is a major player in the global cocaine trade operating within Colombia where it helps finance and support several of Colombia's local paramilitary drug-trafficking groups such as the left-wing National Liberation Army

descriptions: ELN is listed as a rival of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: La Oficina , Clan del Golfo , FARC dissidents , ELN , Los Tiguerones (until November 2023) , Latin Kings [ unreliable source? ] , La Unión Tepito (certain cells) , Fuerza Anti-Unión , Sinaloa Cartel

descriptions: El Tren de Aragua y el ELN combatieron entre sí.
edges.evidence_quote: El 25 de mayo de 2021 se presentaron fuertes combates entre el ELN y el Tren de Aragua, aliado del Clan del Golfo

Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.description: Multiracial one-percenter outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1967 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Primarily based in Philadelphia, with chapters in at least 25 states and Puerto Rico. Engages in drug trafficking, robbery, murder, and other violent crimes. Deemed a violent gang by federal officials.

descriptions: Bandidos fought with Wheels of Soul at a fundraiser.
edges.evidence_quote: members of the Wheels of Soul were holding a fundraising event ... when Bandidos bikers arrived, prompting a fight between the clubs

descriptions: A Wheels of Soul member attacked Hell's Lovers clubhouse, and Hell's Lovers returned fire, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: On August 2, 2010, a member of the Wheels of Soul fired upon the Hell's Lovers' clubhouse in Denver with a shotgun from a sports utility vehicle. Three Hell's Lovers bikers who were inside the clubhouse returned fire.

descriptions: Pagans attacked Wheels of Soul to stop their expansion.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1982, the Pagans attacked members of the Wheels of Soul in Philadelphia in an effort to cease the Wheels of Souls' expansion.

descriptions: Sin City Deciples are rivals with Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sin City Deciples are rivals with the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul engaged in a shootout with Ghetto Riders in 1979.
edges.evidence_quote: On November 22, 1979, Wheels of Soul was involved in a shootout at Woodrow Wilson High School in Camden, New Jersey against rival gang Ghetto Riders.

descriptions: The text lists Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: The text lists Outcast Motorcycle Club as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: Wheels of Soul members confronted and shot at Real Kings members, resulting in deaths on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: Five members of the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club then entered the shop and told the Real Kings members that they were not supposed to be there. This led to a melee confrontation which erupted into a shootout, leaving the president of the Real Kings MC dead as well as two Wheels of Soul MC members.

descriptions: The text lists Sin City Titans as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

descriptions: The text lists Street Soldiers as an enemy of Wheels of Soul.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemies of the Wheels of Soul include the Outcast Motorcycle Club, Sin City Titans, Hells Lovers Motorcycle Club and the Street Soldiers.

Popeye Moto Club.description: French-Canadian outlaw motorcycle club and criminal organization based in Quebec, founded in 1965 by Michel Langlois, Roger Calve, Yvon Bilodeau, and others. At their peak, they were the second-largest biker gang in Canada, known for drug trafficking, extortion, and violence. In 1977, they were absorbed by the Hells Angels and became the first Canadian Hells Angels charter.

descriptions: Devil's Disciples fought a turf war with Popeyes from 1968 to 1970, and later conflict continued.
edges.evidence_quote: disbanding in January 1976 as a result of a biker war with the Popeyes

descriptions: Devil's Disciples were allied with Satan's Choice in war against Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: the Devil's Disciples were also participants in the notable gang war between Satan's Choice and the Popeye Moto Club

descriptions: Dubois Brothers hired Popeyes Motorcycle Club to fight Devil's Disciples, cooperating in the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Claude Dubois considered this as a threat and intrusion into his and his Brothers territory and hired another muscle group of bikers called the Popeyes Motorcycle Club led by Yves Buteau.

descriptions: The Gitans MC purchased drugs from the Popeye MC.
edges.evidence_quote: They bought their narcotics stockpile from the Popeye Moto Club

descriptions: Popeye Moto Club patched over to become Hells Angels Montreal charter in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977, the Hells Angels arrived in Canada with the Popeye Moto Club patching over to form the Hells Angels' Montreal charter.

descriptions: Popeyes patched over to become Hells Angels chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: On 5 December 1977, the first Canadian chapter was founded in Montreal when a club called the Popeyes led by Yves Buteau were 'patched over'.

descriptions: 13th Tribe MC is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Popeyes enforced a policy against red-and-white color schemes on other clubs, including Black Angels MC.
edges.evidence_quote: On multiple occasions, they would forcibly tear the patches off of kuttes of said motorcyclists. Some motorcycle clubs that would be affected by the Popeyes' rules included the Zombi MC, Black Angels MC and Escape Hell MC.

descriptions: The Popeyes fought a turf war with the Devil's Disciples from 1968 to 1970.
edges.evidence_quote: From 1968 up until 1970, a short but violent turf war for control of the drug trade went between the Popeyes and Devil's Disciples MC

descriptions: Devil's Disciples is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Outlaws, Satan's Choice, Devil's Disciples

descriptions: Popeyes killed 15 Devil's Disciples members, leading to their disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: The Popeyes, who acted as 'muscle' for the Dubois brothers, killed 15 members of the Devil's Disciples between 1974 and 1976, causing the latter gang to disband themselves in January 1976.

descriptions: The Popeyes worked as muscle for the Dubois Brothers crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1970s, the Popeyes began working as "muscle" for the Dubois Brothers

descriptions: Dubois Brothers backed the Popeyes in the conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The same underworld struggle drew in the Irish West End Gang on the side of Satan's Choice while the Dubois Brothers gang backed the Popeyes.

descriptions: The Popeyes enforced a policy against red-and-white color schemes on other clubs, including Escape Hell MC.
edges.evidence_quote: On multiple occasions, they would forcibly tear the patches off of kuttes of said motorcyclists. Some motorcycle clubs that would be affected by the Popeyes' rules included the Zombi MC, Black Angels MC and Escape Hell MC.

descriptions: Gitans MC is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Grim Reapers are listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Hells Angels were longtime allies of the Popeyes and absorbed them in 1977.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1977, the Popeyes were "patched over" (absorbed) by their longtime allies the Hells Angels Motorcycle Club

descriptions: The Mongols MC were absorbed by the Popeyes' chapter in 1974.
edges.evidence_quote: A fellow Quebec-based club, the Drummondville-based Mongols MC (unrelated to the U.S.-based club of the same name), became absorbed by the Popeyes's Rive-Sud chapter in late 1974.

descriptions: The Rizzuto crime family is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice is described as a rival of the Popeyes.
edges.evidence_quote: At their peak, they were the second-largest biker gang in all of Canada, behind the rivaling Satan's Choice.

descriptions: Satan's Choice is listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Outlaws, Satan's Choice, Devil's Disciples

descriptions: Sundowners MC is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Dubois Brothers, Hells Angels, Rizzuto crime family, Grim Reapers, Gitans MC, 13th Tribe MC, Sundowners MC

descriptions: The Popeyes enforced a policy against red-and-white color schemes on other clubs, including Zombi MC.
edges.evidence_quote: On multiple occasions, they would forcibly tear the patches off of kuttes of said motorcyclists. Some motorcycle clubs that would be affected by the Popeyes' rules included the Zombi MC, Black Angels MC and Escape Hell MC.

descriptions: Satan's Choice fought the Popeyes in a biker conflict from 1974 to 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: The club was involved in the first major outlaw biker conflict in Canadian history, when it engaged the country's second largest club, the Popeyes, from 1974 to 1976.

descriptions: Popeye listed as a rival in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Hells Angels MC (1974–1995), Outlaws MC (1977–2000), Black Diamond Riders MC, Loners MC, Popeye MC

descriptions: Satan's Choice (Montreal chapter) and Outlaws fought against Popeyes, who were backed by Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: This led the Montreal chapter and their Outlaw allies into open conflict with the Hells Angels-backed Popeyes, resulting in a number of casualties on both sides.

descriptions: Satan's Choice and Popeyes were in a conflict from 1974 to 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: The club was involved in the first major outlaw biker conflict in Canadian history, when it engaged the country's second largest club, the Popeyes, from 1974 to 1976.

descriptions: Elephant and Castle Mob was allied with the Finsbury Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: They were allied to the Birmingham gang, often called the Brummagems, led by Billy Kimber; the Camden Town gang, led by George Sage and the Finsbury Boys, led by Freddie Gilbert.

descriptions: Throttle Twisters merged into the new Satan's Choice in 1965.
edges.evidence_quote: a 1965 alliance of four regional motorcycle clubs: the Phantom Riders of Oshawa, the Canadian Lancers of Scarborough, the Throttle Twisters of Preston, and the Wild Ones of Port Credit.

descriptions: Tongan Foe Lyfe Ganster Crip is listed as an ally of Tongan Crip Gang in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sons of Samoa , Tongan Foe Lyfe Ganster Crip, Raymond Avenue Crips

descriptions: The Delli Carri battery is a sub-group (costola) of the Sinesi-Francavilla clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Donato Delli Carri, 30 anni, nipote di Roberto Sinesi, affiliato alla batteria Delli Carri, costola del clan Sinesi-Francavilla

descriptions: Delli Carri is a sub-group (costola) of the Sinesi-Francavilla battery.
edges.evidence_quote: Le indagini consentono di documentare l'operatività della batteria Delli Carri (costola dei Sinesi-Francavilla)

descriptions: Guerrisi and Mercuri united through marriage in the 1920s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni venti, i Guerrisi s'unirono con i Mercuri

descriptions: Mercuri associated with the Corica family.
edges.evidence_quote: associandosi poi alla famiglia Corica

descriptions: White Wolves are alleged to be a splinter group of Combat 18.
edges.evidence_quote: Some journalists believed that the White Wolves are a C18 splinter group, alleging that the group had been set up by Del O'Connor, the former second-in-command of C18

descriptions: The Mazzaferro have contacts with the Calabrò.
edges.evidence_quote: ma hanno contatti anche con i Barbaro , i Calabrò, i Bruzzaniti , i Morabito e i Raso-Albanese

descriptions: Calabrò is listed as an allied 'ndrina of Romeo.
edges.evidence_quote: 'Ndrine alleate - Calabrò

descriptions: De Luca is listed as an ally of Iannazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: ... De Luca

descriptions: Bubbo is allied with Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: alleata dei ... Farao-Marincola

descriptions: Gallace are among the major allies of Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono tra i maggiori alleati dei Farao-Marincola e delle 'ndrine sanlucote.

descriptions: The Giglio are allied with the Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , dei Farao-Marincola di Cirò e dei Levato.

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The Caligiuri are allies of the Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Farao-Marincola e con i Coco-Trovato .

descriptions: Big Circle Gang was formed by former members of the Red Guards.
edges.evidence_quote: They were given the moniker "Big Circle Gang" and were formed by former members of the Red Guards

descriptions: Red Berets paramilitaries joined the clan, increasing its power.
edges.evidence_quote: El clan creció en importancia después de la caída de Slobodan Milošević con la llegada de muchos paramilitares boinas rojas, incluyendo Milorad Ulemek.

descriptions: Ida Boys formed from younger TMD members.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the younger members of TMD had begun to associate with the London Bloods movement and began calling themselves Ida Boys (also known as Ida Rydaz, Ida Bloodstarz, or IDA), Bloodline or Bloodgang, and BWF (Broadwater Farm).

'Ndrina Belfiore.description: The 'Ndrina Belfiore is a Calabrian criminal organization based in Gioiosa Jonica, with operations in Turin, France, and Spain. It was involved in the 1983 murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia in Turin. The group has been engaged in drug trafficking, including a 1994 seizure of 5 tons of drugs. Recent operations in 2008 and 2018 targeted the clan.

descriptions: Belfiore and Piromalli were jointly involved in a drug trafficking operation.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dal distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: Belfiore forms alliances with Ursino-Macrì in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: A Torino stringono alleanze con gli Ursino -Macrì.

descriptions: Belfiore and Ursino jointly ordered the murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 giugno 1983 fanno uccidere insieme agli Ursino a Torino il magistrato Bruno Caccia.

descriptions: Lo Presti had ties with Belfiore and many other Calabrian and Sicilian mafia families.
edges.evidence_quote: Ha avuto legami con tutte le più importanti famiglie mafiose della Calabria e della Sicilia . I Belfiore , i Tripodo , i Mesiani Mazzacuva, i Ruga , gli Aquino , gli Ierinò , i Macrì , i Morabito , i Varacalli , i Cataldo , gli Strangio , i Barbaro , gli Alvaro , i Palamara , i Raso-Albanese e i Facchineri .

descriptions: Piromalli and Belfiore were involved together in a drug trafficking case in 1994.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel 1994 vengono sequestrati dalla distretto antimafia di Torino 5 tonnellate di droga alla cosca dei Piromalli e dei Belfiore

descriptions: Belfiore are the referents of Ursino in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel capoluogo torinese i loro referenti sono i Belfiore

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi sold drugs to their Calabrian allies, the Belfiore.
edges.evidence_quote: I Miano si rifornivano di droga ... e successivamente la rivendevano ai loro alleati calabresi, i Belfiore e gli Ursino
